brief: Digitally Literate newsletter and curated public notebook
decisions: Public note types are Evergreen, Grove, and Forest.
Seed, Sprout, and Plant remain private development states.
Light mode is the default reading surface; explicit reader choice persists.
Texture is limited to semantic Apparatus regmarks, never resting-state backgrounds or body text.
Homepage rhythm uses a compact named spacing scale and avoids inherited plugin block margins.
Homepage illustration is a decorative grove, not a maturity-stage taxonomy mark.
The masthead retains the full Digitally Literate name.
The homepage title remains on one line while the earlier geometric grove form supplies the counterweight.
Evergreen motion is isolated to the tree forms; the grove baseline remains fixed.
